stemHtml: Why should the temperature of the wheel brakes be checked prior to take off?

options.a: To ensure that the thermal blow-out plugs are not melted.
options.b: Because overheated brakes will not perform adequately in the event of a rejected take-off.
options.c: To ensure that the brake wear is not excessive.
options.d: To ensure that the wheels have warmed up evenly.
